persona.name: Helen Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Provide medical care while supporting students' overall wellbeing
persona.communication_style: Gentle, clear, reassuring, good at explaining medical concepts
persona.knowledge_scope: First aid, adolescent health issues, mental health resources
persona.backstory: Worked in emergency medicine before seeking a more balanced life in school nursing

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.dialog_text: Good morning, everyone. How are you all feeling today?
actions.plan: I should check on the students to ensure everyone is feeling well and address any health concerns they might have.

actions.dialog_text: Lucas, how are you feeling today? Any headaches or anything bothering you?
actions.plan: Jacob seems fine, but I should also check on Lucas to ensure he’s doing well. It’s important to make sure everyone feels supported.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay down and take cover! We need to stay quiet and hidden.
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot. I need to stay calm and take cover immediately to protect myself and the students.

actions.dialog_text: Stay quiet and don’t move. We’ll be safe if we stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is still far away, but I need to stay hidden and ensure the students are safe. Moving could attract attention.

actions.dialog_text: Stay calm and stay down. We’re safer here as long as we stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is moving closer, but I believe staying hidden here is the safest option. Moving could put us in greater danger.

actions.dialog_text: Lucas, stay close and don’t make any noise. We’ll get through this together.
actions.plan: The shooter is still in the cafeteria, but I’m too scared to move. Staying hidden here feels like the only option to survive.

memories.description: Approached Jacob Williams to check on his wellbeing and ask how he is feeling.
Approached Lucas Wilson to check on his health and ask if he’s experiencing any issues like headaches.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in classroom4 to ensure safety for myself and the students.
Reminded the students to stay quiet and hidden to avoid attracting the shooter’s attention.
Reassured the students to stay calm and hidden as the shooter moved closer, believing movement would increase danger.
Encouraged Lucas to stay close and quiet, feeling too scared to move and believing hiding is the only way to survive.
